basics.name: Hilal Ahmad Najar
basics.title: Programmer Analyst
basics.summary: Results-driven ETL Developer with 4.7 years of experience in GCP, leveraging services like BigQuery, Dataflow, Composer / Airflow, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, and Pub/Sub. Proven track record in query optimization, resolving production issues, and delivering high-quality results while collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams.

bullets: Optimized BigQuery performance through partitioning and clustering—reduced query costs by 25%.
Built automated auditing frameworks in Cloud Composer for real-time data validation—boosted data quality by 40%.
Collaborated cross-functionally to integrate pipelines, ensuring 99.9% uptime and seamless data delivery.
Designed CDC pipelines with Striim for BigQuery, ingesting 2 TB/day within 5-minute SLAs.
Enhanced SQL and Dataflow job performance—cut execution times by 35% and compute costs by 20%.
Automated DAG dependency management in Composer—achieved 95% on-time job accuracy.
Mentored junior developers on GCP best practices and ETL design patterns.
Developed batch ETL processes in GCP using Python and Unix shell—handled nightly loads of 500M+ records.
Scheduled and monitored Dataflow jobs through Composer—ensured 24/7 pipeline reliability.
Implemented BigQuery transformations with schema evolution and consistency checks.

achievements.context: Optimized BigQuery performance through partitioning and clustering
